narrative:
Cols 62-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,569 registered voters, with 65.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.7 percentage points.
